company.name: Sam Marbles & Granites
company.tagline: Premium Marbles & Granites for Elegant Living Spaces
company.description: Sam Marbles & Granites is one of the leading marble and granite showrooms in Kolathur, Chennai. With over 20 years of experience, the company offers premium quality marbles, granites and other natural stones sourced from Andhra Pradesh, Rajasthan and other parts of India.

owner.name: Dr. C. M. Victor Emmanuel
owner.about: Dr. Victor Emmanuel served society as a dedicated medical doctor for many years, treating thousands of patients. Later, following his passion for business and to support his father's vision, he joined Sam Marbles & Granites. Today he personally travels across India to source premium quality marbles and granites for his customers.

seo.title: Sam Marbles & Granites | Premium Marble & Granite Showroom in Kolathur, Chennai
seo.description: Premium Marbles, Granites and Natural Stones in Kolathur, Chennai. Over 20 years of trusted service.
